title: Kilner Replacement Tap for Drinks Dispensers Drip-Free Design with Leak-Proof Silicone Washers Fits 3 L, 5 L and 8 Litre Dispensers Easy to Install and Clean
features: DRIP-FREE DESIGN | Ensures smooth and consistent liquid flow, making it perfect for serving beverages without spills.
LEAK-PROOF SEAL | Includes two silicone washers and an inner bolt to securely fit the glass dispenser wall and prevent leakage.
EASY INSTALLATION & REMOVAL | Quick to assemble and disassemble, allowing for hassle-free cleaning and maintenance.
UNIVERSAL FIT | Compatible with Kilner 3L, 5L, and 8L drinks dispensers, offering versatility for various setups.
PERFECT FOR ANY OCCASION | Ideal for catering, buffets, weddings, and entertaining at home, providing reliable and convenient beverage dispensing.
THE KILNER STORY | With over 180 years of trusted craftsmanship, Kilner offers innovative, sustainable food storage and preserving solutions, blending heritage with quality.
